description: A overgrown garden path between the shoebox houses. Tall blades of grass (well, tall for a shoe) sway in the breeze. The path branches off in several directions.

wall.description: A dense thicket of weeds and dandelion stems.

grass.description: Soft, green grass that feels like velvet under your sole.

exit_north.description: The path leads north back to the neighbor's house.

exit_window.description: A precarious-looking trellis leads up toward the attic window sill.

exit_west.description: The path leads west back to the main street.

exit_east.description: The path leads east toward the Breakfastopia gates.

exit_south.description: The path leads south toward the forest entrance.
